doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), misrepresents the IAB Europe CJEU case, and proposes legally implausible positions contradicting established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains within scope if re-identifica
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated March 2026 (a future date from the present), uses a false CJEU case citation (IAB Europe C-604/22 relates to cookie consent, not pseudonymization), and contains legally implausible positions (that processors without linkage keys fall entirely outside GDPR scope) contradicting established EDPB guidance and GDPR Article 4(11)'s definition of pseudonymized data.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document is dated in the future (March 2026), misrepresents the IAB Europe CJEU case, and proposes legally implausible positions contradicting established GDPR interpretation that pseudonymized data remains within scope if re-identification is reasonably likely.
